name: Vert Infrastructure Ltd.
summary: Vert Infrastructure Ltd. invests in, constructs, owns, and leases greenhouse projects to licensed cannabis producers. The company's portfolio of project includes cultivation properties in California; and two in Washington State, such as a 1,000-acre Nevada cannabis farm and 2,115 acres of hemp CBD farms. It develops a portfolio of assets, including Canna Drink, a cannabis infused functional beverage line and 16 Cannabis brands. Vert Infrastructure Ltd. was incorporated in 2011 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
